languages.text: {n}Вы чувствуете, как ядовитые шипы царапают доспехи. Словно разумные, они ищут любую лазейку в броне — и не находят.{/n}
{n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы чувствуете, как ядовитые шипы царапают доспехи. Словно разумные, они ищут любую лазейку в броне — и не находят.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}
{n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}
{n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}

languages.text: {n}毒の棘があなたを掻きむしる。根を張った生き物のように、鎧の隙間を探し回るが、見つけることはできない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 毒の棘があなたを掻きむしる。根を張った生き物のように、鎧の隙間を探し回るが、見つけることはできない。

languages.text: {n}Zehirli dikenlerin seni tırmaladığını hissediyorsun. Kök salan yaratıklar gibi zırhında boşluk arıyor ama bulamıyorlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zehirli dikenlerin seni tırmaladığını hissediyorsun. Kök salan yaratıklar gibi zırhında boşluk arıyor ama bulamıyorlar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sientes el arañazo de las espinas venenosas. Como criaturas escarbadoras, buscan huecos en tu armadura... y no encuentran ninguno.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sientes el arañazo de las espinas venenosas. Como criaturas escarbadoras, buscan huecos en tu armadura... y no encuentran ninguno.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你感觉到这些有毒的尖刺在抓挠着你，就像试图扎根一样。它们寻找着你盔甲上的缝隙——但一无所获。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你感觉到这些有毒的尖刺在抓挠着你，就像试图扎根一样。它们寻找着你盔甲上的缝隙——但一无所获。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous sentez les épines empoisonnées vous érafler. Comme des créatures fouisseuses, elles cherchent à passer sous votre armure, mais ne parviennent pas à trouver d'interstices dans lesquels se glisser.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous sentez les épines empoisonnées vous érafler. Comme des créatures fouisseuses, elles cherchent à passer sous votre armure, mais ne parviennent pas à trouver d'interstices dans lesquels se glisser.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du spürst die giftigen Stacheln auf deiner Haut. Sie suchen wie hungrige Tiere nach Lücken in deiner Rüstung ... allerdings ohne Erfolg.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}
